claim_title: README projection horizon conflicts with AGENTS horizon

results.description: Find contradictory horizon strings in README and AGENTS.
results.command: readme=$(rg -n "2025-2045" README.md | wc -l); agents=$(rg -n "2025 to 2055|2025-2055" AGENTS.md | wc -l); echo "README_2025_2045_COUNT=$readme"; echo "AGENTS_2025_2055_COUNT=$agents"; if [ "$readme" -ge 1 ] && [ "$agents" -ge 1 ]; then echo "ASSERTION=PASS"; else echo "ASSERTION=FAIL"; exit 1; fi
failure_reasons: stdout does not match regex: README_2025_2045_COUNT=[1-9]
